title: Darktrace Email Basic Email Handler
content:
Runs a common Email workflow for fetch Darktrace Email incidents.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Darktrace pack (Darktrace, partner-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: DarktraceEmail, IsIntegrationAvailable, IsTrue, IsValueInArray.
raw_yaml:
id: Darktrace Email Basic Email Handler
version: -1
name: Darktrace Email Basic Email Handler
description: Runs a common Email workflow for fetch Darktrace Email incidents.

      bcc:
      cc:
      timings:
        retriescount: 2

      name: Release Email
